summary: This token has critical security issues. The tax fee recipient is a smart contract address, which is the exact pattern from the April 3rd TaxToken incident. Selling this token will likely fail.

rules.name: Honeypot Recipient
rules.message: CRITICAL: Tax fees sent to smart contract. Sells may fail. This is the exact pattern from the April 3rd incident.

rules.name: Predatory Tax Config
rules.message: HIGH: Creator takes >50% of tax fees with minimal holder rewards.

rules.name: Extreme Fee Rate
rules.message: MEDIUM: 10% fee on every trade is very high.

rules.name: Zero Holder Rewards
rules.message: Holders receive a share of rewards.

rules.name: Bonding Curve Health
rules.message: Bonding curve not yet near graduation.
